# RFC 3161 TSA Endpoints
# Format: name|url|tier
# Tier 1: Windows/Adobe trust stores (most credible)
# Tier 2: Big tech
# Tier 3: Community/other

# Tier 1 - Credible CAs
digicert|https://timestamp.digicert.com|1
sectigo|https://timestamp.sectigo.com|1
globalsign|https://rfc3161timestamp.globalsign.com/advanced|1
entrust|https://timestamp.entrust.net/TSS/RFC3161sha2TS|1
trustwave|https://timestamp.ssl.trustwave.com|1
identrust|https://timestamp.identrust.com|1

# Tier 2 - Big Tech
microsoft|http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com|2
apple|http://timestamp.apple.com/ts01|2
sigstore|https://timestamp.sigstore.dev|2

# Tier 3 - Community
freetsa|https://freetsa.org/tsr|3
cesnet|https://tsa.cesnet.cz:3162/tsa|3
